lines.en_lit: Rav Yosef said: between them placing hands to the one who said: all that are written in its invalidates placing hands also invalidates to the one who said: A matter that does not invalidate throughout the generations does not invalidate placing hands does not invalidate

And throughout the generations From where do we derive does not invalidate As it was taught “And he shall place and it shall be accepted Does placing hands atone Isn’t atonement only by the blood, as it is stated: “For it is the blood that makes atonement by reason of the life”

And what does the verse state: “And he shall place…and it shall be accepted”? one deemed placing hands a peripheral aspect of the mitzva the verse ascribes to him as though he did not achieve atonement; and atones

Rav Naḥman bar Yitzḥak said: waving between to the one who said: all that are written in its invalidates invalidates And to the one who said: A matter that does not invalidate throughout the generations does not invalidate does not invalidate

And throughout the generations, From where do we does not invalidate As it was taught to be waved to make atonement Does waving atone Isn’t atonement only by the blood, as it is stated: “For it is the blood that makes atonement by reason of the life” And what does the verse state: To be waved to make atonement? one deemed waving a peripheral aspect of the mitzva the verse ascribes to him as though he did not achieve atonement; and atones

Rav Pappa said: sequestering seven between to the one who said: all that are written in its invalidates invalidates And to the one who said: A matter that does not invalidate throughout the generations does not invalidate does not invalidate
And throughout the generations, From where do we does not invalidate from the fact that it is taught they designate and it is not taught: remove

Ravina said: multiple seven anointment seven between to the one who said: all that are written in its invalidates invalidates And to the one who said: A matter that does not invalidate throughout the generations does not invalidate does not invalidate

And throughout the generations, From where do we does not invalidate As it was taught what does the verse state: “And the priest who shall be anointed and who shall be consecrated to serve in his father’s stead shall make the atonement”

Since it is stated: “Seven days shall the son that is priest in his stead don them” I only multiple seven and was anointed seven multiple seven and was anointed one multiple one and was anointed seven from where the verse states: “Who shall be anointed and who shall be consecrated”; in any case
We found multiple seven ab initio; from where do we anointment seven ab initio?

If you wish, say: from that the verse: is necessary to exclude And if you wish, say that the verse states: “And the sacred garments of Aaron shall be for his sons after him, to be anointed in them and to be consecrated in them” Anointment is juxtaposed to multiple Just as multiple for seven so too, anointment for seven
What is the reason of the one who said: all that are written in its invalidates Rabbi Yitzḥak bar Bisna said the verse states: “And so shall you do to Aaron and to his sons So, invalidates well all
